title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at RERA Authorities

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at RERA Authorities
jsonLd.description:
RERA Authorities, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Jaipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About RERA Authorities:
RERA Authorities is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RERA Authorities!
